name: AutoWebinar (Evergreen) Watch-% Segmented Follow-Up
summary: The follow-up for an EVERGREEN automated webinar that runs 24/7. Identical persuasion content to the live webinar close, but the branching is driven by WATCH PERCENTAGE / watch-time tracking instead of a fixed live date. Watch-time triggers segment registrants into: registered-no-show, watched-but-left-before-pitch, watched-through-the-pitch-no-buy, and buyer — each gets a tailored sequence. Cart-close runs on a per-registrant evergreen countdown, not a global date.

trigger.primary_event: AutoWebinar registration (registrant picks a start time or 'watch now')
entry_conditions: Contact registered for the evergreen webinar (tag `autowebinar-registered`); per-registrant deadline starts from their registration/scheduled time
segmentation_inputs: Left early (watch % below the pitch point, e.g. <60%)
Watched through the pitch (>= pitch %) but didn't buy

sequence.step: Confirm + reminders relative to chosen start time
sequence.beat: Confirm the booking and drive attendance to the registrant's selected session time (or immediate 'watch now').
sequence.delay: Immediately; then reminders at 1 day / 1 hour / start time before their chosen slot
sequence.body_framework: Soap Opera Email #1 'Set the Stage' (compressed, since evergreen) + reminder cadence. If they chose 'watch now', skip straight to the broadcast room.

sequence.step: Segment on watch % after the session window
sequence.beat: After their session window closes, the watch-time signal routes them into one of four follow-up tracks.
sequence.delay: Evaluated ~1-2h after their scheduled end time

branches.no_show: Re-invite to the next available slot + 'replay available' — re-sell the promise (Soap Opera High-Drama re-hook).
branches.left_early: 'You missed the best part' — tease what came AFTER they dropped (the secret + the offer), drive back to the replay.
branches.watched_no_buy: Go straight to The Stack recap + the 3 Closes — they heard the pitch.

sequence.body_framework: Watch % is the segmentation engine (AutoWebinar Funnel watch-time tracking).

sequence.phase: C. Replay + close (3 Closes on an evergreen timer)
sequence.step: Emotion -> Logic -> Fear across the registrant's personal cart window
sequence.beat: Drive the sale before THIS registrant's cart closes; the deadline is per-person, computed from their registration, not a global date.
sequence.delay: Replay immediately; closes spread across the personal cart window (e.g. Day 0 / Day 1 / Day 2 final)
sequence.body_framework: Same 3 Closes as the live template: (1) EMOTION close — Epiphany Bridge story + future-pace; (2) LOGIC close — The Perfect Webinar Stack (components + value total + price reveal + guarantee); (3) FEAR close — honest per-registrant deadline (evergreen countdown that actually expires for them). SMS at their personal deadline.
sequence.copy_notes: Evergreen scarcity MUST be honored per-registrant (their bonus/price really does expire when their timer ends) — otherwise it is the fake urgency the books warn against.

copy_persona.primary: Expert Secrets + DotCom Secrets — Perfect Webinar Stack + Epiphany Bridge + 3 Closes (same persuasion content as the live webinar template).
scripts_used: Soap Opera Email #1 'Set the Stage' (compressed confirmation)
3 Closes Emotion -> Logic -> Fear, on a per-registrant evergreen timer
copy_persona.support_persona: jim-edwards-copywriting-secrets — 'you missed the best part' curiosity hooks for the left-early branch; honest-scarcity discipline.
copy_persona.structural_persona: russell-brunson-the-funnel-hackers-cookbook — AutoWebinar Funnel: registration -> confirmation -> broadcast/replay room -> post-webinar offer -> segmented follow-up sequences BY WATCH DURATION (registered / watched-to-end / left-early / no-show).

ghl_build.engine: Skill 44 (caf) builds the workflow; watch-% segmentation arrives as inbound webhook/tag from the evergreen webinar platform, then drives GHL if/else branches.

trigger_config.ghl_trigger: Form Submitted = autowebinar registration (or Tag Added `autowebinar-registered`)
trigger_config.watch_signals: Webinar platform posts watch-% milestones via Inbound Webhook / Custom Webhook -> sets tags: `aw-noshow`, `aw-left-early`, `aw-watched-pitch`, `aw-offer-clicked`
trigger_config.timer: Store a per-registrant cart-close datetime custom field at registration; FEAR close waits until it

actions_in_order: 2. Wait until 1h-before chosen slot -> SMS reminder (skip if 'watch now')
3. Wait until session start -> SMS 'starting now' + room link
5. If/Else on watch tags: route to no-show / left-early / watched-no-buy / buyer branches
6. (branch) Send Email + SMS — Replay re-hook appropriate to segment
ghl_build.goal_event: `autowebinar-purchased` -> exit selling steps, route to onboarding.
ghl_build.notes: The ONLY structural difference from the live template is the trigger/timing source: watch-% webhook tags + a per-registrant evergreen countdown replace the global live date. Persuasion content is identical. Per-registrant deadline must truly expire to keep urgency honest.

books: The Funnel Hacker's Cookbook (AutoWebinar Funnel: segmented follow-up by watch duration — registered / watched-to-end / left-early / no-show)
DotCom Secrets (AutoWebinar Funnel; Soap Opera; 3 Closes)
Expert Secrets (Perfect Webinar, The Stack, Epiphany Bridge)
Copywriting Secrets — Jim Edwards (curiosity hooks, honest scarcity)
source.fidelity_note: Watch-duration segmentation (registered / watched-to-end / left-early / no-show) is taken directly from the AutoWebinar Funnel description. Close content reuses the documented Perfect Webinar Stack + 3 Closes. No invented mechanics.

flexibility.principle: This template is a recommended default and a resource — it is NEVER a rule or a requirement.
flexibility.mode_1_user_has_explicit_desire: Do exactly what the user wants. This template is an optional reference only; it is never imposed or overridden onto their choice.
flexibility.mode_2_user_is_unsure: Suggest this proven template and explain why it works, but let the user decide.
flexibility.mode_3_user_wants_it_handled: Build the whole automation from this template.
flexibility.note: Always overridable, mixable, customizable, or ignorable. It assists; it does not dominate.
